name: Garden Harvest Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 28 oz Can Whole Tomatoes, cut-up, undrained
1 16 oz Can Kidney Beans, rinsed and drained
1 10 oz Package Frozen Sweet Corn, defrosted
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil over medium-high in a skillet.
2. Saute garlic, peppers, mushrooms, and onion until tender.
3. Add tomatoes with liquid, tomato sauce, chili powder, sugar, and cumin; bring to boiling.
4. Reduce heat to low.
5. Add beans, zucchini, and corn; simmer, uncovered, about 10 minutes or until zucchini is tender.
6. Serve in bowls; sprinkle with cheese if desired.
Yield: 6 Servings (2-1/2 Qts) Diabetic Exchanges: One serving (prepared with low-salt tomato sauce and no cheese) equals 2 starch, 2 vegetable, 1 fat; also, 252 calories, 675 mg sodium, 0 mg cholesterol, 44 gm carbohydrate, 10 gm protein, 7 gm fat.
